hero.title: From Still to Motion: Transform Images Into Videos Instantly
hero.subtitle: Upload a single image and let our AI transform it into a smooth, cinematic video.
hero.cta: Generate Your First Video for Free

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Create professional videos in four simple steps

steps.title: Upload the image and describe what you want to create
steps.description: Select your image and provide a detailed description of the video you want to create. Our AI will use both to generate the perfect video.

steps.title: Click the button to generate
steps.description: Hit the generate button and let our AI start transforming your image into dynamic video content.

steps.title: Process with AI
steps.description: Our advanced AI models analyze your image and apply cinematic motion effects to bring it to life.

steps.title: View the video online and download for use
steps.description: Watch your animated video, make any adjustments, and download it in high quality for your projects.

features.title: Effortless Video Creation
features.description: Convert images to video in just a few clicks. Upload your photos and let our AI-powered online video maker do the rest.

features.title: AI-Powered Enhancements
features.description: Use AI to create image animations, add smooth transitions, and apply effects that bring your visuals to life while captivating your audience.

features.title: Customized Resolution
features.description: Select your preferred resolution with one click to optimize your video generation.

features.title: Multiple Ratio Options
features.description: Select your desired ratio and use the generated video for easy sharing on social media.

features.title: Fast and Simple
features.description: Go from photo to video in under 10 minutes with no compromise on quality.

communityCta.title: Turn Images Into Engaging Videos
communityCta.description: Transform your photos into stunning videos with VidFab. Forget complicated operation — our AI video generator simplifies the process for you.

items.question: How does VidFab AI generate videos automatically?
items.answer: It transforms written prompts or scripts into moving visuals by using powerful AI models. The system interprets your text, generates frames that match your description, and ensures motion consistency.

items.question: Is VidFab AI Video Generator beginner-friendly?
items.answer: Absolutely! Anyone from a beginner to an expert can create videos on VidFab. You can create explainer videos, marketing videos, promo videos & many more using VidFab.

items.question: What languages are supported for text input?
items.answer: We currently support multiple languages including English, Japanese, Spanish, and more. Support for additional languages is being added regularly.

items.question: Do I need to download any software to use VidFab AI video generator?
items.answer: No downloads are needed to generate videos using VidFab. It is a web-based tool, and it works well on all popular browsers such as Safari, Google Chrome, and others on all devices from mobile to desktops.

items.question: Can I use VidFab for commercial purposes?
items.answer: Yes, our service supports both personal and commercial purposes. However, please ensure compliance with our terms of use.

items.question: Can I use VidFab AI Video Generator for Free?
items.answer: Yes. VidFab will provide 50 credits, allowing you to try generating videos initially.
